overall.description: A nighttime walk through a historic city street in a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2), featuring wet cobblestone roads illuminated by gas street lamps. A horse-drawn carriage crosses the path early in the clip, and the camera continues through a New Orleans-inspired urban environment with multi-story brick buildings and wrought iron balconies.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with tram tracks

events.description: horse-drawn carriage enters from right and crosses the cobblestone street ahead
carriage completes crossing and moves to the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet cobblestone street at night, approaching the crossing carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two horses crossing the street from right to left

entered.detail: two-story brick building with illuminated 'LOVE BROS' signage and red facade
curved corner building with 'BANK' signage and arched windows
cast iron gas lamp post illuminating the street with warm light
three-story building with wrought iron balconies and shuttered windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a historic city street at night, with the camera walking past the 'Love Bros' building. A horse-drawn carriage crosses the wet cobblestone road from right to left, illuminated by gas street lamps. The architecture features classic brick buildings with wrought iron balconies typical of a New Orleans-inspired setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic street with tram tracks and parked wagons

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the bank building and various storefronts

notable_agents.action: person standing on the sidewalk near a building entrance

entered.detail: wooden freight wagon parked on the side of the street
wooden advertising board with posters on the sidewalk
stacked wooden crates and barriers on the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Having passed the carriage, the camera continues down the straight cobblestone street. The bank building recedes into the distance on the left while wooden crates and a parked wagon appear on the sidewalks. Sparse pedestrians stand near building entrances as the camera moves past various historic storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrower historic street section with wooden barricades

agents.ego_description: walking past wooden barricades and crates lining the left sidewalk

entered.detail: large wooden barrier and crate structure on the left sidewalk
building with illuminated entrance and prominent balcony

segments.scene_description: The camera progresses through a slightly narrower section of the historic district, passing wooden barricades and crates on the left. A saloon building with warm interior lighting becomes visible on the right. The street continues straight ahead with tram tracks running down the center, approaching a distant intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching street intersection with converging roads

events.description: street opens up into a wider intersection with multiple building facades and converging roads visible ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, continuing straight with a slight turn to the right

entered.detail: tall brick corner building with arched windows and ground floor entrance
ornate hanging sign for a business attached to the corner building
large multi-story building with numerous lit windows facing the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up into a wider intersection as the camera approaches a corner. A prominent brick building with a hanging business sign occupies the left foreground, while a large multi-story building with illuminated windows stands ahead at the intersection. The street widens significantly, revealing more of the night sky and the converging roadways of the historic district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic city street at night, transitioning from a narrow, bustling corridor into a wide urban intersection. It begins by walking past the Love Bros building as a horse-drawn carriage crosses the wet cobblestone road under the glow of gas street lamps. As the carriage passes, the camera continues straight, leaving the bank building behind while passing parked wagons, wooden crates, and sparse pedestrians along the sidewalks. The scene then tightens slightly as the camera moves past wooden barricades and a warmly lit saloon, following tram tracks that lead toward the distance. Finally, the view opens up into a broad intersection, passing a brick building with a hanging sign on the left to reveal a large multi-story structure and the expansive night sky above the converging roadways.
